channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 24A: traffic accident
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic accident in the range Agavenweg. [On 24.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic accident in the range Agavenweg.
[On 24.07.2026]

item.title: 16A: police operation
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 24.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 24.07.2026]

item.title: Karlsplatz 5 - 4
item.description: In the period from Friday the 24.07.2026 from 20 watch to Monday the 27.07.2026 at 53X:00 is maintained one lane per direction of travel. [23.07.2026 – 28.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the period from Friday the 24.07.2026 from 20 watch to Monday the 27.07.2026 at 53X:00 is maintained one lane per direction of travel.
[23.07.2026 – 28.07.2026]

item.title: Burggasse 67
item.description: The stop of the public transport concerned is from Burggasse ONr.67 to Burggasse ONr. The right lane is blocked in the direction of the city. [27.07.2026 – 02.10.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the public transport concerned is from Burggasse ONr.67 to Burggasse ONr. The right lane is blocked in the direction of the city.
[27.07.2026 – 02.10.2026]

item.title: Hernals Hauptstraße from Dornbacher Straße and Güpferlingstraße to Urbangasse
item.description: The diversion in the direction of the city inwards is via: Dornbacher Straße - Güpferlingstraße - Lascygasse - Urbangasse - Hernalser Hauptstraße.More information about the … [27.07.2026 – 04.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The diversion in the direction of the city inwards is via: Dornbacher Straße - Güpferlingstraße - Lascygasse - Urbangasse - Hernalser Hauptstraße.More information about the …
[27.07.2026 – 04.09.2026]

item.title: Wien Schottentor: Schottenring from crossing Universitätsring and Schottengasse and bulkhead passage to crossing Heßgas
item.description: In the working area the tram operation is stopped. [13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the working area the tram operation is stopped.
[13.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]

item.title: 60A: 60A. Liesing S

item.title: 61A1X: Liesing S
item.description: Stop change of line 61A towards Vösendorf-Siebenhirten Stop: Liesing S From: Liesinger square 2, Bussteig A After: Liesinger square 1 Duration: From 29. July … [23.07.2026 – 23.07.2027]

item.title: 1/2/3A/71/D: demonstration on 2507.2026
item.description: Because of an demonstration at the ring, the following traffic measures are taken. [22.07.2026 – 25.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of an demonstration at the ring, the following traffic measures are taken.
[22.07.2026 – 25.07.2026]
